creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Pierre DAVID from comment #9)

The NO_ARCH handling was incorrect for netmagis-www and netmagis-topo.  The logs showed this in QA:

pkg-static: DEVELOPER_MODE: Error: arch "FreeBSD:11:*" -- package installs architecture specific files

This was committed with changes mentioned in the commit message above.  Thank you for your work maintaining this port Pierre!
